```prompt
---
agent: agent
description: "Set up SLO/SLI/SLA definitions and monitoring"
---
# SLO/SLI/SLA
## Task
Define and monitor SLOs, SLIs, and SLAs.
## Requirements
1. Define SLIs (latency p99, error rate, availability). 2. Set SLOs (99.9% availability, p99 < 200ms).
3. Calculate error budgets. 4. Alert when error budget is burning fast.
5. Create SLO dashboard.
## Constraints
- SLOs must be measurable. Error budget drives development velocity. Review quarterly.
## Success Criteria
- SLIs measured accurately. SLOs tracked. Error budgets monitored. Dashboard visible.
```
